entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Major oilseed crop grown in Telangana, India, primarily during the post-rainy season.

entities.name: TELANGANA
entities.description: Indian state where the groundnut value chain study was conducted.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where the study took place.

entities.name: PADDY
entities.description: Crop preferred during the rainy season under irrigation in the study area.

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: Crop preferred during the rainy season under irrigation in the study area.

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: Crop preferred during the rainy season under irrigation and in drylands.

entities.name: BASELINE SURVEY
entities.description: Representative primary survey used to document groundnut cultivation practices and constraints.

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: Qualitative data collection method used to complement household data.

entities.name: TABLET-ASSISTED CS-PRO PROGRAMMING
entities.description: Digital tool used for data collection by field investigators.

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The yield of groundnut and haulm per unit area.

entities.name: KADIRI 6
entities.description: The dominant groundnut cultivar used in the targeted districts.

entities.name: K 1812
entities.description: A groundnut cultivar chosen by farmers in the study area.

entities.name: TAG 24
entities.description: A groundnut cultivar chosen by farmers in the study area.

entities.name: PICS BAGS
entities.description: Low-cost on-farm seed storage technology to improve seed access.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Stress from living organisms that limits groundnut productivity.

entities.name: POD BORER
entities.description: A pest that causes biotic stress in groundnut crops.

entities.name: LATE LEAF SPOT
entities.description: A disease that causes biotic stress in groundnut crops.

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS
entities.description: A type of abiotic stress related to water deficiency.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESS
entities.description: Non-living environmental stress factors affecting crop genetic improvement.

entities.name: AFLATOXIN CONTAMINATION
entities.description: Presence of aflatoxins in groundnut produce.

entities.name: VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: The sequence of activities from groundnut production to industry use.

entities.name: FARMER PROFITABILITY
entities.description: The economic gain of farmers from groundnut cultivation.

entities.name: SEED SYSTEMS
entities.description: The mechanisms for seed supply and distribution, including informal systems.

entities.name: CROP MANAGEMENT STRATEGIES
entities.description: Methods to reduce seed rate and optimize irrigation.

entities.name: MECHANIZATION
entities.description: The use of machinery to reduce cultivation costs and increase profit.

entities.name: NAGARKURNOOL
entities.description: One of the three major districts of Telangana covered in the survey.

entities.name: WANAPARTHY
entities.description: One of the three major districts of Telangana covered in the survey.

entities.name: MAHABUBNAGAR
entities.description: One of the three major districts of Telangana covered in the survey.
